input.user_input: Does this software licensing agreement grant the licensee the right to sublicense? Where in the document does it say that?

actual: You have not provided a software licensing agreement for me to review. Please upload or paste the text of the agreement, and I will be happy to analyze it to determine whether it grants the right to sublicense and point you to the specific section where that is stated.
